mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, indicator_code, value_numeric, value_text, unit, reference_low, reference_high, abnormal_flag, source_type, raw_data, collected_at, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM lab_result WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO lab_result ( tenant_id, patient_id, encounter_id, indicator_code, value_numeric, value_text, unit, reference_low, reference_high, abnormal_flag, source_type, raw_data, collected_at ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{patientId}, #{encounterId}, #{indicatorCode}, #{valueNumeric}, #{valueText}, #{unit}, #{referenceLow}, #{referenceHigh}, #{abnormalFlag}, #{sourceType}, #{rawData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, #{collectedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE lab_result SET patient_id = #{patientId}, encounter_id = #{encounterId}, indicator_code = #{indicatorCode}, value_numeric = #{valueNumeric}, value_text = #{valueText}, unit = #{unit}, reference_low = #{referenceLow}, reference_high = #{referenceHigh}, abnormal_flag = #{abnormalFlag}, source_type = #{sourceType}, raw_data = #{rawData, jdbcType=OTHER, typeHandler=xenosoft.imldintelligence.common.mybatis.JsonNodeTypeHandler}, collected_at = #{collectedAt} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
